description: Mapping from CloudFormation resource types to AWS CLI describe operations. Used by evidence synthesis (Phase 7) to probe deployed resources. Each entry maps a CFN type to the service, CLI verb, and name flag for the corresponding describe command.

AWS::Lambda::Function.description: Get Lambda function configuration (KMS key, environment, etc.)

AWS::Lambda::CodeSigningConfig.description: Get code signing configuration for Lambda function deployment

AWS::Lambda::EventSourceMapping.description: Get event source mapping (Kinesis, DynamoDB, SQS, etc.) for Lambda

AWS::Lambda::LayerVersion.note: Requires both --layer-name and --version-number; synthesis must extract version from ARN

AWS::Lambda::Url.description: Get Lambda function URL configuration (auth type, CORS, etc.)

AWS::Lambda::Permission.description: Policy-only resource — no direct describe API. Permissions are read via get-policy on the function.

AWS::IAM::Role.description: Get IAM role metadata (trust policy, tags, permissions boundary)

AWS::KMS::Key.description: Get KMS key metadata (key state, key manager, key policy)

AWS::Logs::LogGroup.description: Get CloudWatch Logs log group metadata (retention, KMS key)

_metadata.usage: Extensible per service. Evidence synthesis (Phase 7) uses this to generate 'aws <service> <verb> <name_flag> <physical_id>' commands for deployed resources.
_metadata.coverage_note: Seeded for Lambda-relevant types. Add entries for other services as needed (S3, DynamoDB, EC2, etc.). If a CFN type is missing, synthesis falls back to NOT_CLI_VALIDATABLE with a coverage warning.
